---
name: Correction or mistake
about: Flag something in the guidelines that looks wrong, outdated, biased, or mis-cited
title: "[correction] "
labels: ["correction"]
---

<!--
This skill will contain mistakes. If a guideline contradicts your lived
experience, you are right and the rule needs to change. A rough, honest flag is
better than a polished one that never gets filed. Skip any field that does not
apply. See CONTRIBUTING.md for more.
-->

### What might be wrong
<!-- Quote the rule, claim, link, or phrasing. Add file + section if you can, e.g. SKILL.md > A7. -->

### Why it might be a mistake
<!-- What is inaccurate, harmful, outdated, biased, or mis-cited? -->

### Suggested correction
<!-- What should it say instead? A rough idea is fine. -->

### Source or evidence (optional)
<!-- A link or citation that supports the correction. -->

### Your perspective (optional)
<!-- e.g. I stammer / I am an SLP / parent / researcher. Share only if you want to. -->

### Severity (optional)
<!-- blocker (actively harmful) / should-fix / minor -->
